des: Nick Loftin doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski.

Royals challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Nick Loftin grounds into a force out, shortstop Jorge Mateo to second baseman Ozzie Albies. Jac Caglianone out at 2nd. Nick Loftin to 1st.
Nick Loftin grounds out, shortstop Jorge Mateo to first baseman Matt Olson.
